programme.title: Corvette Summer
programme.desc: High school graduate Kenneth W Dantley Junior and Vanessa a hooker-in-training try to track down his custom-made newly-stolen Corvette

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: In Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: Kentucky loses his horse in a rigged horse race and gets framed for the murder of a stagecoach driver

programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Bat Mastersons old friend Billy Burns convinces him to become marshal of Liberal Kansas and help the residents fight drought and a destructive range war

programme.title: Tornado Down Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: Operation Desert Storm was only a day old when Tornado pilots John Peters and John Nichol were shot down in Iraqi territory and subsequently tortured and paraded on TV Bruised and battered the two men mumbled incoherently into the camera and instantly became symbols around the world of Saddam’s savagery and aggression In Tornado Down the two pilots break their silence and in a series of moving and candid interviews reveal the physical and psychological torment they suffered at the hands of their captors; the brutal torture sessions; the elation of their release; and their determination not to crack in the face of such cruelty and humiliation

programme.title: Hell in the Pacific Pt3
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific was not just between Japan and America; it was also Britains forgotten war and one of the dirtiest conflicts in living memory Hell in the Pacific is a revisionist examination of that conflict tracing the use of horrific torture and propaganda not only by the Japanese but controversially by the Americans and the Allies as well Included are are previously unheard eye-witness accounts and stories of American troops collecting noses ears and skulls as trophies

programme.title: The USS Enterprise and the Battle of Midway
programme.desc: After expanding the war in the Pacific to include western outposts the Japanese Empire had attained its initial strategic goals quickly taking British Hong Kong the Philippines British Malaya Singapore and the Dutch East Indies modern Indonesia The Dutch East Indies with its vital oil resources was particularly important to Japan Because of this preliminary planning for the second phase of operations commenced as early as January 1942

programme.title: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: In 1942 two German battle-cruisers the Scharnhorst and the Gneisenau put into a French port for repairs and became trapped there targets to be bombed at will by the RAF It was only a matter of time before they would attempt an escape Churchill ordered that the ships must not reach Germany and that they must be destroyed The plan to do so was called Operation Fuller However when the moment came to put the operation into action the plans were locked in a safe and the only man with a key was away on holiday What happened next was a series of one farcical mistake after another which allowed the two German ships to sail right up the English channel and home to Germany The programme also features Operation Eagle Claw the clandestine operation ordered by President Carter in 1980 to free the American hostages held in the Tehran embassy The newly formed Special Operations Group Delta Force began planning a daring rescue However inter-service rivalry intervened with tragic results when the American aircraft carrying the rescue teams crashed into each other in the Iranian desert

programme.title: Shot At Dawn WW1
programme.desc: Shot At Dawn WW1

programme.title: 13 Hours That Saved Britain
programme.desc: 13 Hours That Saved Britain

programme.title: 13 Hours That Saved Britain
programme.desc: 13 Hours That Saved Britain explores the events of a single day 15th September 1940 - the day Churchill described as the crux of the battle a day that is now celebrated as Battle of Britain Day Dramatic colour film footage of aerial combat combined with contemporary interviews will illustrate that the events of seventy years ago still resonate with a new generation

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 2
programme.desc: Part 2 The Undeclared War

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy rock promoter tries to steal the money raised at a benefit concert when his conscience intervenes

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Farmer George is attracted to Mary Jo the nubile young woman who helps out with the chores The problem is shes in love with a scarecrow

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A stressed out bank employee begins having premonitions concerning a serial killer who could be any one of the men in her life

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Sweet singer Miranda and her musician partner Sean are a couple of struggling songwriters who are trying desperately to break into the rock music business Miranda creates a sexy new image for herself in order to achieve the fame and success she desires However Miranda winds up paying an extremely heavy spiritual price because of said sexy image

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: After approaching a convicted fugitive Nick is convinced of her innocence but must prove it before she is put to death

programme.title: Friday the 13Th The Series
programme.desc: A girl finds a compact mirror that has the power to make others adore her and uses the cursed object to seek revenge against her sister

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: A cannibal hermit living in the woods preys on campers and hikers for his food supply

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Fredy 112
programme.desc: Fredy 112

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys are struggling financially so Pepino secretly gets a job moonlighting as a singer at the El Tippi-Tin

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Little Lukes hopes of having his brother as his relay-race partner are dashed when Grampa steps in to take Lukes place

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: At an island paradise hotel 86 and Harry Hoo solve a murder mystery

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 end up on a KAOS sub commanded by Siegfried

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Cindy and Stacks go undercover at a gymnasium linked to a series of baffling burglaries most recently one that netted a 400000 painting entrusted to Bear Enterprises Detective Finger a cross between Columbo and Clouseau joins BJ in cracking the case

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The wives horn in on Wilbur and Rogers duck hunting trip

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.title: Hogans 327
programme.desc: Hogans 327

programme.title: Hogans 303
programme.desc: Hogans 303

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew devise a plan - Potentially beneficial to both them and Captain Binghamton - To have a popular movie star put on a show on Taratupa for Admiral Rogers but must first scheme to get the Stars stubborn Tour Manager out of the way

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress an Admiral Binghamton drops some serious charges against the 73 Crew in return for a show of their high esteem for their Commander in the form of a testimonial dinner Knowing that no one will attend the dinner willingly McHale and The Boys plan to combine the dinner with a big crap game in order to have a showing for the most hated Commanding Officer in the Pacific

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter tries for the Officer Candidate School

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer tries to collect money for Carters birthday

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Professor believes the castaways may be beginning to suffer from Island Madness so he convinces Ginger to use her psychic powers to convince them that a boat is coming to rescue them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A crate containing a lion bound for a zoo washes up on the island But while the other castaways are scared for their lives the lion immediately makes a bond with Gilligan

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The old woman who runs the newsstand in Jonathans building is being blackmailed for a murder she may not have committed

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: George quits the Beaver lodge when he feels that they did not award him a prize he thinks he deserved He tries to start a new lodge with the help of Dick and Michael

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: George volunteers to be a big brother to a boy named Mitch but he would rather have writer and TV host Dick for his big brother

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: When General Craig forgets his wifes birthday he takes MacGillis advice and owns up to it but Mimzy locks him out of the house so they must take him in during the spat

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find parts of an ancient Hieroglyphic stone tablet that may tell them the way to get off the island

programme.title: NIghts 221
programme.desc: NIghts 221

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: A new rift between Matt and the rest of the crew puts the fate of the team in question

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this no-holds-barred season finale Matt and Lou have their final confrontation and the team loses a member Sonia and Lyndah head out with Ashley to repossess a hang-glider in what might turn out to be the last job the three do together Matt Sonia and Lyndah confront a team of shady astronomers who dont want to give up their van and when Froy Matt and Sonia take on a risky job on the bad side of town bullets fly and the life of one of the team hangs in the balance

programme.title: Woman Of Straw
programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: Hercules 216
programme.desc: Hercules 216

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Taelon shuttle is shot down over Antarctica There are Jiridians aboard but two of the passengers escape When Augur discovers Lilis blood on the ship he is convinced that she is not dead

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A noted scientist and old friend of Suzannes Dr Erik Von Deer is being brain-washed through signals subliminally implanted in the music of his favorite artist into secretly working on a serum that will give the aliens immunity to Earths bacteria Suzanne arrives for a weekend visit while Von Deer is on the verge of the serums completion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A sickly stranger claiming to be Tressas long-lost brother appears at the Langford house

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim befriends a little girl with volatile behavior

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: When a ship carrying a prisoner lands at Moonbase Alpha after asking for assistance Maya insists that the prisoner is a poet and not a murderer and releases him

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Determined to win re-election as Hazzard County Administrator at any cost Boss uses every dirty trick he knows in his campaign against the beautiful Thelma Claire TC Rogers the daughter of Boss old political foe

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Drama follows a 25-caliber gun over a week-end and the various lives with which it comes into contact

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IM force is tasked to prevent a rigged election in a small Latin American nation from happening and enabling the results to be genuine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Police drag in Kimble when a co-worker robs the liquor store the fugitives clerking in Some police suspect Kimbles involved but their chief knows hes not - because his alienated son is the stick-up man To repair their relationship the desperate father needs to get his son off Will he feed Kimble to his wolves to do so

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: An outlaw gang leader orders his men to kidnap a teacher so he can learn to read and write for a special purpose His men nab Victoria by mistake-she pretends to be the school marm to buy time for the Barkley boys to find her

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Helping a friend keep her saloon from a crooked gambling combine Cheyenne runs it while she gets to know her daughter who for ten years has been at school back East and knows nothing of how her mother earned the money that kept her there

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: A family moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 26 filmed at the Art Hauser Centre in Prince Albert. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Luke Benoit vs. Chad Halkett; Josh Heinz vs.Randy Coyer; Ben Oliviero vs. Nic Grandbois.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 opens with a pro match between always threatening Zach Manywounds and Trenton Rowell, hungry for his first win. The main event of the evening is welterweight matchup between two exciting Hard Knocks veterans: Joel Powell vs. Adam Smith.

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: In search of a message from Audric Jayce lands on a planet protected by telepathic plants which keep the planet concealed Saw Boss makes a deal with a wicket wizard who has put a sleeping spell on the princess who controls the plants

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: By using a lock of Audrics hair Saw Boss creates a clone which tricks Jayce into a trap Gillian suspects the truth and convinces Jayce to leave the root behind as a precaution Jayce is captured and a clone of Jayce is sent back for the root

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: The Statue of Liberty fails to reappear during Wondros magic act and ends up in a field in Iowa But VENOM has further plans to hold Lady Liberty for ransom

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is after a scepter from the underground city of Rajim Matt and the team pursue them into the city only to have the tables turned and become prisoners of the citys inhabitants

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Evil The Resurrected Devil

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Clash! The Old Red Enemy

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD try to stop Gadget from attending the International Congress of Policemen in London

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain go to an Old Wild West amusement park to stop a MAD plot to make the park their new headquarters

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Leader-1 is shot by Crasher while attempting to destroy Cy-Kills pulsar generator

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Scooter and Turbo struggle to free Matt Nick and AJ from the pulsar generators spell

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron
